phi_holo_gate.secondary_metric: mi_per_element = phi_holo / N; PASS if > 0.05 nats (log(8)=2.08 ceiling)
phi_holo_gate.deprecates: phi_holo > 500 absolute (phantom — raw MI 0.001 noise × N=393216 = 393 at random init, gate passes without learning)
